AddFonts 1.0.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Social Media Posts for AddFonts Launch

Source: social-media-posts.md

LinkedIn Post

🚀 Excited to share my first experimental R package: AddFonts!

I built this to scratch my own itch - downloading and registering GDPR-compliant fonts in R should be simple. AddFonts uses Bunny Fonts (a privacy-first alternative to Google Fonts) to add beautiful typography to your plots with just one function call.

Fair warning: this is very much a rough version - experimental and subject to evolving. But it works!

What made this fun: - 🎓 Learning S7 (https://github.com/RConsortium/S7) - the new object system for R. Great for modeling font metadata and cache logic - 📦 Using rv (https://a2-ai.github.io/rv-docs/) - declarative dependency management that actually makes sense - 🌐 Publishing via r-universe (https://gnoblet.r-universe.dev/AddFonts) - painless package distribution - 🔒 Prioritizing privacy with Bunny Fonts (no tracking, fully GDPR-compliant)

The result:

library(AddFonts)
add_font("merriweather")  # That's it!

Smart caching, full variant support (regular/bold/italic), and one-line setup.

If you’re in the R graphics space or care about GDPR compliance, I’d love your feedback! What would make this more useful for you?

Install: install.packages("AddFonts", repos = "https://gnoblet.r-universe.dev")

Docs: http://guillaume-noblet.com/AddFonts/

#RStats #DataViz #OpenSource #Privacy #GDPR

Bluesky Posts

Post 1 (Main announcement)

🎨 Just launched AddFonts - my first experimental R pkg!

One function to download & register GDPR-compliant fonts from Bunny Fonts. No tracking, just beautiful typography.

library(AddFonts)
add_font("oswald")

It’s rough around the edges (v0.1!), but it works. Had fun playing with S7 classes & rv package manager.

Feedback welcome!

📦 install.packages(“AddFonts”, repos = “https://gnoblet.r-universe.dev”) 📚 guillaume-noblet.com/AddFonts/

#RStats #DataViz

Post 2 (Technical deep dive)

What I learned building AddFonts:

✨ S7 classes are actually nice for modeling font metadata 📦 rv makes R dependency management declarative (finally!) 🌐 r-universe makes package distribution painless 🔒 Bunny Fonts = Google Fonts without the tracking 🎯 WOFF2→TTF conversion is easier than expected

Still very experimental, but shipping beats perfecting.

github.com/RConsortium/S7 a2-ai.github.io/rv-docs/ r-universe.dev

#RStats #LearnInPublic

Post 3 (Use case focused)

Privacy-conscious data viz folks:

AddFonts lets you use 1400+ fonts in R plots via Bunny Fonts (GDPR-compliant, zero tracking).

add_font("merriweather")
preview_font("merriweather")

Downloads once, caches forever. Perfect for EU projects or anyone who values privacy.

⚠️ Experimental! But functional.

#RStats #Privacy #GDPR

Twitter/X Alternative (if needed)

🎨 Built my first R package: AddFonts

Privacy-first fonts for R graphics via Bunny Fonts. One function, smart caching, GDPR-compliant.

⚠️ Very experimental v0.1 ✨ Powered by S7 & rv 🔒 No tracking, 1400+ fonts

install.packages(“AddFonts”, repos = “https://gnoblet.r-universe.dev”)

#RStats #DataViz
